objects.query: SELECT Id, Name FROM Account ORDER BY Name
SELECT Id, StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit
SELECT Id, Code, CatalogId, Name FROM ProductCategory ORDER BY Catalog.Code, Code
SELECT Id, StartDate, EndDate, FullyQualifiedLabel, Type FROM Period ORDER BY StartDate
SELECT Id, DeveloperName FROM AdvAccountForecastSet ORDER BY DeveloperName

SELECT Id, Name, AccountId, AdvAccountForecastSetId, Status, Account.Name, AdvAccountForecastSet.DeveloperName FROM AdvAcctForecastSetPartner ORDER BY AdvAccountForecastSet.DeveloperName, Account.Name

SELECT Id, Name, AccountId, Status, AdvAcctForecastSetPartnerId, PeriodId, PeriodStartDate, ProductId, Category__c, Category__r.Code, SalesAgreementRevenue, SalesAgreementQuantity, OrderRevenue, OrderQuantity, OpportunityRevenue, OpportunityQuantity, LastYearOrderRevenue, LastYearOrderQuantity, ForecastedRevenue, ForecastedQuantity, Account_Manager_Forecasted_Revenue__c, Account_Manager_Forecasted_Quantity__c, AdvAcctForecastSetPartner.Name, AdvAcctForecastSetPartner.Account.Name, Period.StartDate, Period.Type, Product.StockKeepingUnit FROM AdvAccountForecastFact ORDER BY AdvAcctForecastSetPartner.Account.Name, Period.StartDate, Product.StockKeepingUnit NULLS LAST
